_comment: Reference JSON shape for a candidate item. See shared-references/candidate-schema.md for full spec. Adapter implementations (in adapters/) emit arrays of items conforming to this shape. The user-visible storage is candidates.md (markdown) — JSON is only used in machine-to-machine transit (e.g. md-to-sqlite migration, trend-source adapter output).

candidates.title: the high-density family system of "for your own good"
candidates.snapshot_text: "For your own good" is Chinese families' highest-tier rhetoric of controlling their children, backed by a whole cognitive system of "I understand your needs better than you do".
candidates.predicted_reason: ER+SR both 5 top-tier, the high-density family issue is universal and safe to share
candidates.note: heavy issue, not suitable for 2 such pieces in a row

candidates.title: the length of "haha"
candidates.snapshot_text: A study of the nonlinear relationship between "haha" length and willingness to communicate in social media.
candidates.predicted_reason: v2.1 candidate dimensions MS+TS both 5—the key A/B verification sample for the v2.1 upgrade

candidates.title: Show HN: I built a tool that predicts whether your video will go viral
candidates.snapshot_text: Built over a weekend. Uses a simple multidimensional rubric calibrated against creator's own historical data. Curious what the HN crowd thinks of the methodology.
